name: NORTHWEST BIOTHERAPEUTICS INC
business: Northwest Biotherapeutics is a biotechnology company developing personalized immune therapies for cancer. Its lead product, DCVax-L, is designed to treat solid tumor cancers that can be surgically removed, and it has completed a Phase III trial for glioblastoma multiforme brain cancer. The company also has DCVax-Direct for inoperable solid tumors and has submitted a Marketing Authorization Application in the UK for DCVax-L.

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology company focused on developing personalized immune therapies for cancer.
Other novel technologies for cancer are approved and commercially available, such as the Optune electro-therapy device, various biologics and various oncolytic virus therapies and gene therapies.
Collectively these patents and patent applications cover key aspects of the design and function of automated cell culture systems.
